name: Jason Todd
description:
REQUEST— He’s trying to cuddle, but he’s thinking with his dick.

Jason was out on a trip all week, and all he wanted to do was snuggle up with his partner. When he tried, well….his dick had other plans.

BOOM SHAKALAKA!!

Whoever requested this was soo sweet! Whoever you are I hope you like it!
